devices.description: Select the type for each discovered device. Found {device_count} device(s).

fallback.title: Redundancy Polling (Optional)
fallback.description: If you have an ESP32 webserver on your network, enable fallback to prevent devices from being marked unavailable when UDP is temporarily unreachable.
